zh.title: 比特币/美元技术分析：短期盘整偏空
zh.content:
当前比特币价格在$74,798.82附近波动，日内下跌约0.49%，显示市场短期承压。价格接近20日均线SMA(20) $75,526.54下方，表明多头动力不足，短期可能仍处于盘整调整阶段。高点$75,204.01和低点$74,748.04构成近期区间震荡边界。

技术指标方面，MACD处于负值区间(-343.36)，虽缺乏信号线参考，但显示空头势力占优，未出现明显反转信号。RSI数据暂缺，但结合价格走势与均线位置，市场短期偏弱，需要关注成交量变化以确认趋势延续性。

支撑位在$74,750附近，若跌破此位，可能进一步测试$74,400区域；阻力位在$75,200及$75,500附近，多头若无法突破，将继续受压震荡。交易者应警惕区间波动风险，短线可考虑逢低轻仓介入，设置止损防范下行突破。

综合来看，比特币短期维持弱势盘整，技术面显示卖压偏重，谨慎追高为宜。关注关键支撑和阻力，结合日内波动节奏进行操作，避免过度介入，耐心等待趋势明朗化后再布局中线或波段交易。

en.title: Bitcoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
BTC/USD is currently exhibiting a mild bearish consolidation phase after failing to sustain momentum above the short-term moving average. Price action at 74,798 remains below the SMA(20) at 75,526, indicating short-term weakness. The market structure suggests lower highs forming, while intraday volatility remains compressed near recent lows. Despite the limited 24-hour decline of -0.49%, buyers have yet to reclaim control, and the broader bias leans cautiously bearish unless price reclaims resistance decisively.

Momentum indicators reinforce the bearish-to-neutral stance, with MACD currently at -343.36 signaling downside pressure and weakening bullish momentum. Although RSI data is unavailable, price behavior near the lower boundary of the daily range suggests neither strong oversold reversal signals nor confirmed recovery strength. The absence of a positive signal line reading further supports a cautious outlook. Market participants appear to be in a wait-and-see mode, with directional conviction still lacking in the short term.

Immediate technical levels show BTC/USD defending a critical support zone around 74,750, closely aligned with the intraday low at 74,748. A break below this area could expose downside extensions toward 74,000 and potentially deeper liquidity pockets. On the upside, resistance is observed at 75,200, followed by the SMA(20) near 75,526, which remains a key dynamic barrier. A sustained move above 75,526 would be required to shift short-term momentum back toward bullish recovery.

From a trading perspective, the current environment favors range-bound strategies rather than directional conviction trades. Short positions may be considered on failed retests of 75,200–75,500 with tight risk controls, while long setups require confirmation above 75,526 for momentum continuation. Until a breakout occurs, traders should prioritize disciplined risk management and avoid overexposure, as price compression near support increases the probability of sharp, sudden moves in either direction.
